"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const useMatch = require("./useMatch.cjs"); function useLoaderData(opts) { return useMatch.useMatch({ from: opts.from, strict: opts.strict, structuralSharing: opts.structuralSharing, select: (s) => { return opts.select ? opts.select(s.loaderData) : s.loaderData; } }); } exports.useLoaderData = useLoaderData; //# sourceMappingURL=useLoaderData.cjs.map
